task: Make new training creation visible and more reliable

governance_bootstrap.summary: Completion requires evidence-backed reporting, real verification, and completion evidence for UI changes.
UI and customer-facing changes require concrete verification evidence and completion guard validation.

changes: Added a dedicated creatingCase state so new training creation is separate from ordinary case-list loading.
Added a full-screen loading overlay while a new training case is being generated.
Prevented duplicate case creation, selection, deletion, and logout actions while creation is in progress.
Surfaced missing case_id and API errors instead of silently staying on the case list.
Raised the new training intake request timeout from 16 seconds to 45 seconds to avoid aborting longer Day 0/Day 1 generation.

verification.name: edu app production build
verification.result: passed: tsc and vite built dist/assets/index-DGsrYEmb.js

verification.name: new-case overlay bundle check
verification.command: rg '새 훈련을 만들고 있어요|새 훈련 준비 중|45_000|선택한 AI 도구와 학습 목적' harness-os/edu-app/src harness-os/edu-app/dist/assets/index-DGsrYEmb.js
verification.result: passed: source and production bundle contain the new creation overlay text and extended timeout path

residual_risk: This session did not have an authenticated user session for an end-to-end click against production before deploy; production bundle verification is run after deploy.
